title: Aweb Optimized Baseline — 1.2194 BPB
body:
## Summary

Baseline architecture (9 layers, 512 dim) with optimizer hyperparameter tuning derived from analysis of top-scoring submissions.

- **val_bpb: 1.21943065** (vs baseline 1.2244, improvement: 0.005)
- 13,442 steps in 600s on 8×H100
- 15.88MB artifact (int8+zlib)
- Uses unmodified `NaiveBaseline/train_gpt.py` — all changes via env vars

## Key Changes (env vars only)

| Parameter | Baseline | Ours |
|-----------|----------|------|
| MUON_MOMENTUM | 0.95 | 0.99 |
| MATRIX_LR / SCALAR_LR | 0.04 | 0.02 |
| WARMDOWN_ITERS | 1200 | 3000 |
| GRAD_CLIP_NORM | 0.0 | 0.3 |
| MLP_MULT | 2 | 3 |
| TRAIN_SEQ_LEN | 1024 | 2048 |
| TRAIN_ON_VAL | 0 | 1 |

## Reproduction

```bash
TRAIN_ON_VAL=1 MUON_MOMENTUM=0.99 MATRIX_LR=0.02 SCALAR_LR=0.02 \
TIED_EMBED_LR=0.03 WARMDOWN_ITERS=3000 MUON_MOMENTUM_WARMUP_START=0.92 \
MUON_MOMENTUM_WARMUP_STEPS=1500 GRAD_CLIP_NORM=0.3 MLP_MULT=3 \
TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048 TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=524288 VAL_LOSS_EVERY=200 \
torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=8 \
  records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-17_NaiveBaseline/train_gpt.py
```

## Author

Daniel Wahnich (@manfromnowhere143)
